Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, create a Treasure token.
If an effect would create tokens, it creates twice that many.
At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card and lose 1 life.
At the beginning of each player's upkeep, deal 2 damage.
